free_text: Effect of non-alpha-cluster projectile on
incomplete-fusion dynamics: experimental study of the
14N + 181Ta system
Shri Varshney College, Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh
Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi
University of Petroleum and Energy Studies,
Dehradun-Uttarakhand
Amity University, Noida
Isotopically pure 181Ta targets (purity 99.98%) and Al
catcher/energy-degrader foils (thick ~1.2-1.7 mg/cm2)
were prepared by rolling technique.
100cc detector having resolution 1.2 keV for the
1.33 MeV gamma-ray of 60Co.
The irradiation for each stack was carried
out for ~8-10 hrs.
Beam current is ~25-30 nA monitored by using
Faraday cup.
The overall errors including statistical
errors are estimated to be <=15%
VT
